title: Disable the Alt+a keyboard shortcut in the ProxyAI plugin
author: roson
body:
### Describe the need of your request

Disable the Alt+a keyboard shortcut in the ProxyAI plugin. 
In Polish, Alt+a is the abbreviation for the letter 'ą'. 
When I type a prompt and press Alt+a, the text is cleared. 

### Proposed solution

I would like to ask how I can disable the Alt+a keyboard shortcut in the ProxyAI plugin. 

### Additional context

_No response_

title: FIM Options not offered
author: CSEliot
body:

Despite being able to set up FiM in Providers settings (Custom), the model options for autocomplete fim include only Inceptions offerings. (Or Inception via ProxyAI subscription.)

```shell
2. Go to Settings>Tools>ProxyAI>Models and attempt to assign a "Next Edit".
```

title: Unable to configure deepseek-v4 under the OpenAI (Chat Completions API) template
author: zgqtql666
body: ### What happened? It seems that deepseek-v4 cannot be configured properly under the OpenAI (Chat Completions API) template in ProxyAI. Testing the connection throws the error: "Connection failed: Model deepseek-v4-flash does not support completion".Additionally, I've noticed that I'm unable to select the OpenAI template that was supported in older versions of ProxyAI. ### Relevant log output or stack trace ```shell ``` ### Steps to reproduce _No response_ ### CodeGPT version ProxyAI-3.8.1-261 ### Operating System Windows

title: Windows Support
author: paper-tiger
body:
### What happened?

I tried to use gemma-4-e4b locally with the agent functionality and asked it to analyze my codebase.
The Task-Tool did not work because the "description" field was missing but the fallback Explore Function seemed to do something at first glance but then the llm reported that "bash ls" could not be executed. I tried to install cygwin to emulate the behavior but that was not enough because globs etc. do not work. Is there no windows support? Or can i customize the tools in any way to make them windows-compatible?

### Relevant log output or stack trace

title: Empty "API key" for custom OpenAI Provider causes chat to fail
author: phansel
body:
### What happened?

When connecting to a local or custom OpenAI server, even one without any API key requirement, the API Key field under "Tools/ProxyAI/Providers/Custom OpenAI" must not be empty or the API will respond "Something went wrong." 

Putting any characters in the API key field at all will result in working chat responses.

### Relevant log output or stack trace

```shell

```

### Steps to reproduce

_No response_

### CodeGPT version

3.8.0-24.1.1

### Operating System

Windows

title: Incompatible with DeepSeek V4 (Pro/Flash): missing reasoning_content in context
author: feifeiai
body:
### What happened?

ProxyAI is incompatible with the newly released DeepSeek V4 series models (deepseek-v4-pro / deepseek-v4-flash).
Please note the requirements for multi-turn conversations with the latest DeepSeek V4 reasoning models:
If the model makes any tool calls between two user messages, the assistant's reasoning_content generated in between must be included in the context and passed back to the API for all subsequent user conversation rounds.
If your code fails to correctly pass back reasoning_content, the API will return a 400 error.

Please fix this bug as soon as possible.


### Relevant log output or stack trace

```shell
Error from client: CustomOpenAILLMClient Message: Expected status code 200 but was 400 Status code: 400

Error: Subagent 'explore' failed with HTTP 400: Error from client: CustomOpenAILLMClient Status code: 400 Error body: {"error":{"message":"The `reasoning_content` in the thinking mode must be passed back to the API.","type":"invalid_request_error","param":null,"code":"invalid_request_error"}}
```

### Steps to reproduce

_No response_

### CodeGPT version

3.8.0-241.1

### Operating System

None

title: Incompatible with DeepSeek V4 (Pro/Flash): missing reasoning_content in context
author: feifeiai
body:
### What happened?

ProxyAI is incompatible with the newly released DeepSeek V4 series models (deepseek-v4-pro / deepseek-v4-flash).
Please note the requirements for multi-turn conversations with the latest DeepSeek V4 reasoning models:
If the model makes any tool calls between two user messages, the assistant's reasoning_content generated in between must be included in the context and passed back to the API for all subsequent user conversation rounds.
If your code fails to correctly pass back reasoning_content, the API will return a 400 error.

Please fix this bug as soon as possible.

I see that Kotlin PSI shipped 18 months ago https://github.com/carlrobertoh/ProxyAI/pull/571

Any chances to get it for Golang? Maybe LSP over MCP would work as a workaround for now? Switching from sweep.ai which goes offline tomorrow, and they have hooked into PSI for completion.

thx

title: Shell execution stoped to work for systems without bash
author: abishai
body:
### What happened?

Execution for ProxyAI  > 3.7.3 stoped working under FreeBSD, because FreeBSD uses /bin/sh as shell interpreter.
Looks like the result of https://github.com/carlrobertoh/ProxyAI/issues/1188


### Steps to reproduce

Try to run shell on FreeBSD without bash installed.

### CodeGPT version

Not a CodeGPT

### Operating System

FreeBSD 15.0
